summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of iteration 5 visual enhancements completed. All features working correctly: Flag emojis in language selector (US flag 🇺🇸 for EN, Italian flag 🇮🇹 for IT), bigger header logo (h-14), bigger footer logo (h-16), animated shimmer gradient on 'Ferrante' text (text-shimmer class), active section indicator in header nav (gold highlight when scrolling), case study cards with cs-card-glow class for hover glow effect, section reveal fade-in animations (useReveal hook), WorldMap shows '13' countries (not '12+'), parallax-bg class on hero background, Azequo Engineering link updated to https://azequoengineering.com.
passed_tests: Cookie banner appears on fresh visit with Accept/Decline buttons
Language selector shows flag emojis (🇺🇸 for EN, 🇮🇹 for IT, etc.) - not text names
Header logo has h-14 class (bigger than before)
Footer logo has h-16 class (bigger than before)
Hero 'Ferrante' text has text-shimmer class for animated shimmer gradient
Hero background image has parallax-bg class for parallax effect
Header nav HOME is highlighted gold at top of page
Header nav SERVICES turns gold when scrolled to services section (active indicator working)
Case study cards have cs-card-glow class for hover glow effect (6 cards on homepage)
Case studies preview section has reveal animation (opacity-100, translate-y-0 transitions)
WorldMap shows '13' countries (not '12+')
Hero stats show '13 COUNTRIES SERVED'
/partners/azequo-engineering page loads correctly
Azequo Engineering website link is https://azequoengineering.com
/case-studies page loads with 20 case studies and filter buttons (ALL, PM, Marketing, RE)
/case-studies/cs-pm-01 detail page renders with Challenge, Solution, Results sections
/privacy page loads with Privacy Policy title and multiple sections
Footer has privacy link
Footer has LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram social icons
Footer WhatsApp shows text labels (EUROPA & ASIA, USA & LATAM) - not phone numbers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 visual enhancements tested and working. Key CSS classes verified: text-shimmer (animated gradient on Ferrante), parallax-bg (hero background), cs-card-glow (case study cards hover glow), reveal-section (fade-in animations). Active nav indicator uses IntersectionObserver and only works on homepage (isHome check). Cookie banner uses localStorage key 'mfc-cookie-consent'. App URL: https://graphics-portal-1.preview.emergentagent.com. 20 case studies total. WorldMap now shows '13' consistently.

mocked_apis.POST /api/contact: logs but does not send actual email
